did_this_paper_use_ai_to_obtain_results_.details: The paper titled 'Leveraging a Viral AI-Generated Aging Filter on TikTok to Enhance Sunscreen Use' utilized an AI-generated aging filter (a computational modeling/AI technique) to simulate future skin aging. This AI-driven feature was used as an intervention to assess its effect on sunscreen use intention among college students, thereby obtaining results in a dermatology/skin cancer prevention context.

is_this_paper_a_review_paper_or_a_resear.details: The paper titled 'Limitations of quantum artificial intelligence for enhanced skin cancer diagnosis' explicitly states in its abstract that the authors 'conducted a scoping review of the literature' and 'systematically searched major databases' to synthesize data on quantum artificial intelligence applications. Scoping reviews are classified as review papers.

non_compliance_reason: The paper is a review, survey, or meta-analysis rather than an original research paper.
